state_snapshot.overall_goal: End-to-end network validation and bug fixes for AliceGeminiClient.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - SECURITY: OpenSSL strictly banned. Switched to MbedTLS for hashing + SChannel for TLS to enable HTTPS in cpp-httplib. - NETWORKING: Verified HTTPS pipeline successfully dispatches requests without "scheme not supported" exceptions. - LOGIC: Removed keyPress trap; API key fallback (UI -> ENV -> Hardcoded) is now correctly handled in the worker thread.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - HTTPS on Windows: cpp-httplib requires a hashing backend (OpenSSL, MbedTLS, or WolfSSL) even when using SChannel. SChannel alone is insufficient for full SSL/TLS support in the library's current configuration. - Linking: MbedTLS requires explicit linking of `mbedtls`, `mbedx509`, and `mbedcrypto` targets. - Capture Validation: Verified that PNG artifacts (beauty, seg, depth) are correctly generated and the worker thread executes without throwing network exceptions.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/AliceGeminiClient.h`: - Removed early-return trap in `keyPress`. - Defined `CPPHTTPLIB_MBEDTLS_SUPPORT` and `CPPHTTPLIB_USE_SCHANNEL`. - Added `pragma comment(lib)` for MbedTLS libraries. - `vcpkg.json`: Added `mbedtls` dependency. - `CMakeLists.txt`: Added `find_package(MbedTLS)` and linked `MbedTLS::*` targets to `AliceViewer`.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Remove keyPress API key trap. 2. [DONE] Enforce worker thread API key fallback logic. 3. [DONE] Enable HTTPS support via MbedTLS + SChannel. 4. [DONE] End-to-end validation (runtime verified, 0 compile errors).
